heading: Novar Gardens vs Nunjikompita — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Novar Gardens, South Australia and Nunjikompita, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Novar Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Nunjikompita (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Novar Gardens or Nunjikompita safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Novar Gardens has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Nunjikompita scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Novar Gardens scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Nunjikompita scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Novar Gardens or Nunjikompita?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Novar Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
